title: AAP Capability Grant Token claim set (AAP-SPEC section 4.2)
description: Claims of the CGT, ratified byte-for-byte from the reference broker assertion (Secretless src/broker/cpi/assertion.ts). `iss` is the minting broker's issuer identifier, `sub` the agent DID from the verified ATX, `aud`/`scope` the downstream audience and OAuth scope, `trust_class` the ATX capability (abstract trust class) exercised for this grant, `issuer_chain`/`trust_level` the federation attributes carried for v2 cross-broker verification. The optional FGA members (`fga_constraints`, `intent_verified`, `max_uses`, `context_required`) are optional-to-ignore (AAP-SPEC section 8.3) and are not minted by the v1 reference.
